sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal, i.q. חוּל No. 7, to remanin, to delay. Compare חוּל No. 7.

Piel יִחֵל-

(1) causat. to cause to hope for something; followed by עַל Psa 119:49 by a gerund, Eze 13:6.

(2) to expect, to hope, to wait, absol. Job 6:11 13:15 14:14 29:21 followed by לְ of the person or thing expected, Job 29:23 30:26 followed by אֶל Isa 51:5 Psa 130:7 131:3 . There often occur לֵאלֹהִים, יִחֵל לַיהֹוָה Ps. 31:25 33:22 69:4 אֶל יְיָ Psa 130:7 131:3 .

Hiphil הֹוחִיל i.q. Piel, to expect, to wait for, 1Sa 10:8 13:9 2Sa 18:14 followed by לְ Job 32:11 followed by לַיהֹוָה [it should have been said לֵאלֹהִים], Psa 42:6.

Niphal נֹוחַל, fut. יִיָּחֵל i.q. Piel and Hiphil, but properly to be caused to hope, Gen 8:12 Eze 19:5.

Derived nouns, יָחִיל, תֹּוחֶלֶת [and in Thes. the following pr.n.].
